title: Inbound Block: clean up follow relationships, no error exposed
description:
Handle Block{object: local_actor_uri}: remove any follow relationships (remove from followers where remote_account blocks local, remove from follows where local follows remote). Return 200. Handle Undo{Block}: return 200 and do nothing (does not restore follows).

**Agent workflow**: Spawn a research subagent to capture Block and Undo{Block} fixtures from mastodon.social.

**Test discipline**:
- Block: followers row removed
- Block with no follow relationship: 200, no error
- Undo Block: 200, no change to follows
All fixtures captured from real servers. Real in-memory SQLite for DB tests — never mock the database.

**Defensive programming**:
- Never expose 'you are blocked' information to the blocking actor
- The block operation must be idempotent
- No .unwrap() outside test code; all errors Result<T, AppError>
- Validate inputs at system boundaries
acceptance_criteria: Block removes follow relationships; no prior relationship returns 200; Undo Block accepted and silently ignored; operation is idempotent; no block status leaked to blocking actor
